item.title: Medtronic Perfusion Systems: Octopus Evolution AS Tissue Stabilizer, Model TS2500 Recall
item.product: Octopus Evolution AS Tissue Stabilizer, Model TS2500
item.summary: During the manufacturing process, Medtronic personnel identified an assembly issue where the tubing was incorrectly positioned. The short tube was attached to the bottom of the canister, and the long tube was attached to the top, contrary to the intended design. Product details: Octopus Evolution AS Tissue Stabilizer, Model TS2500
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
